chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-230 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A No.1897/ 2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 24.10.2025. Mr. Afzal Kareem Virk advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Laghari advocate for the applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G. = Through the Criminal Miscellaneous application, the applicant has challenged order dated 07-10-2025 passed in Criminal Misc. Application No. 176/ 2025 by learned Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khipro. This Court has rendered single Order dated 25-08-2025 in Criminal Miscellaneous application No.S-26 of 2025 and others whereby it has been observed that application under section 561-A Cr.P.C is not maintainable against order passed by Ex-Officio Justice of Peace and aggrieved person has to file Constitutional Petition before Divisional Bench of this Circuit Court. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application is dismissed being non-maintainable; however, applicant is at liberty to file Constitutional Petition before Divisional Bench of this Circuit Court. Needless to mention here that limitation/ laches will not come in the way of applicant. JUDGE “Saleem”
